overview: YodhaMedia is a premium production-ready Next.js 15 marketing website for VenIQ Media LLP, targeting hospitals, clinics, doctors, and modern businesses in India. It features a visually rich brand identity with deep purple/gold design system, advanced 3D hero animations, a full blog system, and a complete admin dashboard for blog management — all in one unified Next.js project.
features: Premium marketing website with 8 public pages — Home, About, Services, Blog, Business Hub, Our Work, and more
Advanced 3D hero section using Three.js and React Three Fiber
Smooth Framer Motion animations including parallax, magnetic CTAs, and scroll reveals
Complete admin dashboard for blog management with create, edit, and delete
Multi-step blog creation wizard with rich text editing
Full blog REST API (5 endpoints) built into the Next.js project
Deep purple/gold brand design system with glassmorphism and gradient meshes
Dark mode support, SEO metadata per page, and responsive design
